Risk Description: Partial losses in depleted sand formation
Mitigation Strategy: Maintain optimal ECD, use LCM pills as preventative measure
Contingency Plan: Pump high concentration LCM pill, consider cement squeeze if severe

Risk Description: Complete losses in naturally fractured zone
Mitigation Strategy: Pre-treat mud with LCM, minimize ECD, avoid sudden pressure changes
Contingency Plan: Use lost circulation material, FWFZ blend, cement plug if severe

Risk Description: Hole enlargement due to shale instability
Mitigation Strategy: Maintain adequate mud weight, minimize exposure time, control ROP
Contingency Plan: Ream and wipe problem areas, increase mud weight by 0.2-0.4 ppg

Risk Description: Tight hole conditions in reactive shales
Mitigation Strategy: Use proper mud inhibition, control ROP, monitor torque and drag
Contingency Plan: Wipe and ream tight spots, adjust mud properties, consider POOH if worsening

Risk Description: Key seating in doglegs and high DLS regions
Mitigation Strategy: Monitor dogleg severity, use regular wiper trips, limit RPM in high DLS sections
Contingency Plan: Run dedicated reaming trips, consider dedicated reaming assembly

Risk Description: Differential sticking in permeable zones with high overbalance
Mitigation Strategy: Minimize static time in permeable zones, maintain thin/slick filter cake, controlled ROP
Contingency Plan: Reduce mud weight if safe, work pipe free with jar, spot oil-based pill

Risk Description: BHA components getting stuck against permeable formation
Mitigation Strategy: Minimize time static, maintain proper mud properties, use drill pipe rotation when possible
Contingency Plan: Spot diesel or oil pill, jar up/down, reduce mud weight if possible

Risk Description: MWD tool failure
Mitigation Strategy: Regular preventive maintenance, redundant systems, comprehensive pre-job testing
Contingency Plan: POOH to replace failed components, continue drilling with limited or no data if acceptable

Risk Description: Drill bit failure
Mitigation Strategy: Choose appropriate bit for formation, optimize drilling parameters, monitor MSE and vibration
Contingency Plan: POOH for bit change, consider adjusting BHA design based on wear pattern

Risk Description: Top drive/drawworks failure
Mitigation Strategy: Regular maintenance, redundant systems, trained personnel
Contingency Plan: Secure well, implement repair procedures, assess need for specialized services

Risk Description: Unexpected high-pressure zone
Mitigation Strategy: Careful monitoring of gas trends and connection gas, maintain adequate mud weight
Contingency Plan: Follow well control procedures, increase mud weight, circulate bottoms up more frequently

Risk Description: Ballooning/breathing in fractured formations
Mitigation Strategy: Distinguish between ballooning and kicks, train crew on recognition
Contingency Plan: Monitor flow carefully during connections, document breathing volumes

Risk Description: Poor cuttings removal in high angle section
Mitigation Strategy: Optimize flow rate, rotation, and ROP, conduct regular wiper trips
Contingency Plan: Circulate with high viscosity pills, adjust drilling parameters, dedicated wiper trips

Risk Description: Pack-off around BHA in lateral section
Mitigation Strategy: Optimize hole cleaning practices, monitor ECD, torque, and drag trends
Contingency Plan: Work through with controlled RPM and flow, conduct short trips as necessary

Risk Description: Inability to maintain required DLS in build section
Mitigation Strategy: Optimize BHA design, drilling parameters, regular surveys
Contingency Plan: Consider alternative directional tools, adjust trajectory if necessary

Risk Description: Azimuth control issues in lateral
Mitigation Strategy: Monitor surveys carefully, adjust steering as needed, use rotary when possible
Contingency Plan: Accept reasonable deviations if within overall well plan tolerances

Risk Description: Poor logging data quality due to hole conditions
Mitigation Strategy: Ensure proper hole conditioning before logging, LWD redundancy
Contingency Plan: Repeat critical measurements, consider wireline logs if necessary

Risk Description: Incorrect formation depth estimation
Mitigation Strategy: Use offset well correlation, real-time gamma monitoring
Contingency Plan: Adjust TD based on LWD data, consider pilot hole if necessary

Risk Description: Faults/fracture zones
Mitigation Strategy: Review seismic and offset well data, monitor for losses and gas shows
Contingency Plan: Adjust mud weight, be prepared for sudden lithology changes, potential cement plugs

Risk Description: H2S zones
Mitigation Strategy: H2S contingency plan in place, H2S scavengers in mud, crew training
Contingency Plan: Implement H2S safety protocols, ensure PPE and monitoring equipment

Risk Description: Surface spill of drilling fluids
Mitigation Strategy: Proper containment systems, regular inspection, trained personnel
Contingency Plan: Spill response plan, containment equipment readily available

Risk Description: Groundwater protection during drilling
Mitigation Strategy: Proper surface casing design and cementing, mud program compliance
Contingency Plan: Remedial cementing if necessary, contingency casing point

Risk Description: Exceeding casing setting depth
Mitigation Strategy: Careful depth control, frequent surveys, communication with geologist
Contingency Plan: Well plan modification, management approval for depth extensions

Risk Description: Severe weather impact on operations
Mitigation Strategy: Weather monitoring, securing equipment procedure
Contingency Plan: Suspend operations if necessary, secure well and equipment

Risk Description: Poor cement job on production casing
Mitigation Strategy: Proper hole cleaning and conditioning, centralization plan, cement design
Contingency Plan: CBL/VDL evaluation, remedial cement job if necessary

Risk Description: Excessive NPT due to BHA trips
Mitigation Strategy: Thorough BHA planning, quality components, proper maintenance
Contingency Plan: Optimize tripping procedures, parallel operations where possible

Risk Description: Extended drilling time in curve section
Mitigation Strategy: Optimize BHA and parameters, careful monitoring of progress
Contingency Plan: Evaluate cost/benefit of continuing vs. redesigning BHA

Risk Description: Safety incident during rig floor operations
Mitigation Strategy: Safety training, JSA process, proper supervision, stop work authority
Contingency Plan: Emergency response plan, medical evacuation procedures

Risk Description: Personnel competency gaps
Mitigation Strategy: Pre-job training, competency assessment, supervision
Contingency Plan: Provide additional supervision, replace personnel if necessary

Risk Description: Critical equipment delivery delays
Mitigation Strategy: Advance planning, backup vendors, spare parts inventory
Contingency Plan: Alternative sourcing options, temporary solutions, plan modifications
